title: How to handle demanding executives
preview_text:
Amazon is famous (infamous?) for having some pushy, demanding leaders.
You can handle pushy leaders with my simple approach: Be personally easy to get along with while professionally firm when needed.

title: The Larger a Company Gets, the Harder It Is for Anyone to Truly Know What’s Happening
preview_text: It’s easy to believe that size brings clarity. More people, more process and more systems exist so everything must be under control. In practice, the opposite happens. As companies grow, the truth
